title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 483.200 - If clerk acquitted, reinstatement — costs
text:
483.200.  If clerk acquitted, reinstatement — costs. — If any such clerk shall be acquitted, he shall be reinstated in his office, and the state shall pay the cost.
(RSMo 1939 § 13307, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 11688; 1919 § 2132; 1909 § 2695 
Effective 1-02-79
